text:
Once upon a snowy time, in a little village nestled between sparkling snowdrifts, there lived a plucky girl named Lucy. She loved adventure, whether it meant racing her sled down icy mountainsides or exploring the deepest snow banks.

On a particularly bright day with no snowfall in months, Lucy woke up excited. Today was a special day. She had heard tales about a legendary snow owl that danced upon flakes.

Lucy ventured into the snowforest. Dense branches blocked her path. She peered cautiously between them.

A gentle rustling filled the air. Lucy turned sharply. Out fluttered a beautiful owl, soft feathers a snowy white. Its bright eye sockets gleamed like jewels.

"BEEP!" sang the owl cheerfully.

Lucy blinked. Had she imagined it? She approached curiously and offered a small feather.

Then more birds joined in. A small flock of robins chimed in cheerful bars.

"This snowy owl loves company!" thought Lucy. She became fast friends with
